Surname.jp: 不眠症のちびシスター

description.en: Attacks an enemy and <color=#28d9ed>heals</color> the ally with the lowest current Health by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 체력 상황이 가장 나쁜 아군의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 회복시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、残りHPが最も低い味方単体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>回復する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使生命值最低的友军恢复<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>。

description.en: Restores all allies' <color=#28d9ed>HP</color> by <color=#28d9ed>35%</color> and reduces the duration of debuffs by <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
description.kr: 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>35%</color>만큼 회복시키고, 약화 효과의 지속 시간을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>35%</color>回復し、弱体効果の持続時間を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 为我方全体恢复<color=#28d9ed>35%</color><color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>,并将减益效果的持续时间缩短<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

name.jp: アオイアタック! バースト3!

description.en: Attacks all enemies and heals all allies by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 아군 전체의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 회복시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、味方全体のHPを<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>回復させる。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并使全体友军的生命值恢复\n<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect) Increases Attack and Speed by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> every time the caster takes a turn.\n\nWhile an ally remains alive, reduces <color=#28d9ed>Weakness Gauge damage</color> taken by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 자신의 턴마다 공격력과 속도가 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> 증가합니다.\n\n아군 생존 시 받는 <color=#28d9ed>WG 피해</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 감소합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)自分のターンが来るたびに、攻撃力とスピードが<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>UPする。\n\n戦場に味方がいる場合、受ける<color=#28d9ed>WGダメージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>DOWNする。
description.zh: (被动效果)每到自身回合时,使攻击力和速度提升<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。\n\n使友军存活时受到的<color=#28d9ed>WG伤害</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>。

description.en: Becomes <color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color> every 4 turns.\n\n<color=#28d9ed>Enraged Ultimate Skill</color>: Grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> to surviving allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>, then <color=#28d9ed>Resurrects (Greater)</color> all slain allies. Afterward, recovers <color=#28d9ed>Health</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.
description.kr: 4턴 마다 <color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> 상태로 전환합니다. \n\n<color=#28d9ed>광폭화 돌입과 필살기</color> : 생존한 아군의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킨 후, 사망한 아군 전체를 <color=#28d9ed>부활(강화)</color>시킵니다. 이후 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>만큼 회복시킵니다.
description.jp: 4ターンごとに<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>状態に切り替わる。\n\n<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】と【必殺スキル】</color>:戦場にいる味方の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせた後、倒れた味方全体を<color=#28d9ed>復活(強化)</color>させる。その後、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>回復させる。
description.zh: 每4回合转换为<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>状态。\n\n<color=#28d9ed>进入狂暴化和必杀技</color>:使存活的友军<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>后,使死亡的全体友军<color=#28d9ed>复活(强化)</color>。随后使全体友军<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>恢复<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>。
